meaning: tender loving care 温柔的体贴
examples: What he needs now is just rest and a lot of TLC.
Plants with small, yellow leaves will need some TLC.
"She's badly in need of some TLC," said one colleague.
The third layer uses TLC memory for capacity storage at a much lower price per bit.
The renaissance of Lake Austin should give heart to other resort spas in need of TLC.
